turns.user: Getting 'DNS Probe Finished No Internet' error.

<STATE>{"router_model": null, "lights_status": null, "error_message": "DNS Probe Finished No Internet", "connection_type": null, "has_restarted": null}</STATE>

Try changing DNS to 8.8.8.8 or 1.1.1.1 in network settings.
<STATE>{"router_model": null, "lights_status": null, "error_message": "DNS Probe Finished No Internet", "connection_type": "ethernet", "has_restarted": null}</STATE>

Network settings → adapter properties → IPv4 → set DNS to 8.8.8.8 and 8.8.4.4.
<STATE>{"router_model": null, "lights_status": null, "error_message": "DNS Probe Finished No Internet", "connection_type": "ethernet", "has_restarted": null}</STATE>
